regulatory_risks: Enhanced prudential standards and regulatory tailoring rules as a BHC with over $100 billion in total consolidated assets
Capital and stress testing requirements under U.S. Basel III rules and SCB framework
Liquidity requirements and potential future LCR/NSFR requirements
Resolution planning requirements for CBNA as an IDI with $100 billion or more in assets
Proposed long-term debt requirements for large bank holding companies and IDIs
Standards for safety and soundness under FDIA and prompt corrective action requirements
Deposit insurance assessments and FDIC special assessment related to systemic risk determination
Restrictions on dividends and capital distributions subject to FRB oversight and capital plan approval
Support of subsidiary bank requirements and source of strength obligations
Transactions with affiliates and insiders restrictions under Sections 23A and 23B of Federal Reserve Act
Volcker Rule restrictions on proprietary trading and private fund investments
Regulation of derivatives including swap dealer registration with CFTC
Consumer financial protection regulations under CFPB oversight for institutions over $10 billion in assets
Dodd-Frank Act debit card interchange fee restrictions
Protection of customer personal information and cybersecurity requirements including GLBA and Fair Credit Reporting Act
Climate-related disclosure requirements including SEC final rule and state-level climate regulations
Community Reinvestment Act requirements and revised CRA regulations effective January 1, 2026
Compensation restrictions and oversight by federal banking regulators
Anti-money laundering and financial transparency requirements under BSA and Patriot Act
OFAC sanctions compliance and restrictions on transactions with designated foreign countries and entities
Broker-dealer regulations for subsidiaries including SEC and FINRA oversight
Heightened risk governance standards for large national banks with $50 billion or more in assets
Proposed Basel III Endgame capital framework changes for banking organizations with $100 billion or more in assets

sanction_risks: Effects of geopolitical instability including wars in Ukraine and the Middle East on economic and market conditions
Heightened cybersecurity risks from geopolitical instability
OFAC sanctions compliance requirements and restrictions on transactions with sanctioned countries and entities
